summary: Iteration 3 — Post visual-redesign full regression + new Excel/seed/clear data-management features. Backend: 56/56 pytest passing (49 legacy + 7 new phase-3 tests covering seed-demo, clear-all, export-excel, import-excel round-trip via dashboard counts). Frontend: dashboard renders 8 colorful gradient stat cards, all 13 sidebar nav links route correctly, Settings data-management section exposes export/import/load-demo/clear-all buttons with correct data-testids, Excel export triggers a valid .xlsx download (~18.9KB), language toggle ES/EU works, no console errors, no .error elements detected.

issues: Cards do not expose individual data-testids (e.g. stat-card-activos / stat-card-inscripciones). Hardens future automated tests. Currently selectable only via DOM class. Cosmetic only.
Native <input type='date'> still used instead of shadcn Calendar/Popover across module dialogs (insc-fecha-nac, training-fecha, payment dates, etc.). dd/mm/yyyy locale mismatch for ES users.
Some DialogContent components still missing aria-describedby / DialogDescription (a11y warning).

action_items: (optional) Add data-testid to each Dashboard gradient stat card (e.g. stat-card-jugadores-activos) for future test stability.
(carry-over) Replace native <input type='date'> with shadcn Calendar across module dialogs.
(carry-over a11y) Add <DialogDescription> to remaining Dialogs to silence Radix aria-describedby warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /import-excel: deletes ALL rows of each sheet's collection before insert — this means partial sheets in an uploaded file will WIPE missing collections to empty. Consider documenting this destructive merge behavior or guarding with a query param (e.g. ?mode=replace|merge).

server.py /import-excel: doesn't validate that imported rows pass Pydantic schemas — corrupted/edited spreadsheets can introduce invalid documents that later break the API (e.g. missing 'nombre' on a Player). Optional: wrap each cleaned row in its model_dump() to validate before insert_many.
server.py /seed-demo and /clear-all are unauthenticated destructive endpoints. Acceptable for a no-auth single-tenant club app but should be flagged if deployed publicly.

Backend test fixtures fall back to a hardcoded preview URL; tests should ideally fail-fast when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is unset (acknowledged in env rules). Kept fallback for parity with iteration 1/2 tests.

success_rate.backend: 100% (56/56: 22 phase-1 + 20 phase-2 + 7 phase-3 + 7 already covered earlier)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on smoke flows (dashboard renders colorful cards, 8 sidebar nav targets all route OK, settings data-management buttons present, Excel export download succeeds, language toggle works, no console errors)

seed_data_creation: Phase-3 test wipes DB and calls /api/seed-demo at the end so demo data is restored for further manual/UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run all backend tests serially: `pytest backend/tests/ -n 0`. Phase-3 file (test_phase3_data_mgmt.py) is DESTRUCTIVE — it wipes the DB and re-seeds demo at the end. data-testids added in this iteration: export-db-btn, import-db-btn, import-db-input, load-demo-btn, clear-all-btn, data-management. Dashboard gradient stat cards do NOT yet have per-card testids — selector fallback is `main div.rounded-xl` (8 cards). UI was confirmed end-to-end via Playwright: export-db-btn triggers a download (~18.9KB .xlsx). Language toggle button has data-testid 'lang-toggle' OR can be clicked by role/name='EU'.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. The visual redesign is purely className/CSS — no functional regression confirmed by Playwright smoke tests across all sidebar pages. Import/Export round-trip verified via pytest: export bytes -> clear-all (wipes to 0 players) -> POST import-excel with the saved bytes -> /api/dashboard shows total_jugadores>=5 again. Seed-demo correctly creates 3 teams + 8 players + matches + payments + authorizations + inscriptions + stats + communications.
